ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Cancelled")&& ISBLANK(TEXT( Cancellation_Reason_PickList__c )) && $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps' && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' && ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation' || RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering' || RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Technical_Solutions' || RecordType.DeveloperName ='Trial_Request' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Disapproval reason is required upon request cancellation.
